description: Style Note  Elegant and bright casual wear with a flattering Fit and impressive styling is definitely tonga's forte, and this top from Tonga is a must for the update of your summer monsoon wardrobe. Keep it stylish and simple by pairing up this trendy top with flats and jeans. We like to describe this look as charmingly casual! Product Details A floral printed translucent shirt with a crushed look, has short sleeves with a mid buttoned tab, spread collar, full buttoned placket, loops at the waist for the belt and a curved hemline, yoke at the back with slight gathers, comes with a metallic chain with crystal embellishments in the front  Material and Care  100% polyester  Hand wash cold  Do not bleach  Do not iron Size and Fit Regular fit  The model (height 5'8" and chest 33") is wearing a size M Style Note Elegant and bright casual wear with a flattering fit and impressive styling is definitely Tonga's forte, and this top from Tonga is a must for the update of your summer monsoon wardrobe.
